title: ICMR Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Young Professional Ii Posts
description: The Indian Council of Medical Research (ICMR) has declaredthe latest job notification for the recruitment of Various Young Professional II Jobs. Those candidates who have qualified in the Post-Graduation can grab this chance and apply for these posts. Here we included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, applcation fee, and how to apply for the ICMR Recruitment 2026 . If you are looking for more, here is a list of Government Jobs in 2026 that you can all appl...
